commands.review_summary:
The PR removes browse result-count copy, moves the List/Grid control into the skills header, retains Clear for active filters, adjusts responsive control sizing, and expands focused route tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR proposes an intentional presentation change rather than repairing a demonstrated runtime failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The next action is contributor-visible proof followed by explicit maintainer UX review; there is no concrete code defect suitable for automated repair.

target.title: fix: remove skills browse count copy
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove the `/skills` toolbar count copy entirely instead of showing a loaded-result count.
- Move the List/Grid view toggle into the same header row as the `Skills` title/count, above the skills search input.
- Tighten the List/Grid segmented-control height so it stays compact in that header row.
- Keep the Clear control available for search/category/featured filtered states.
- Add coverage for empty, paginated browse, search pagination, category-filtered states, and the view-toggle/search/header order.

## Verification

- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index-load-more.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/styles.css src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- Local browser check at `http://127.0.0.1:3000/skills`: List/Grid renders in the same header row as `Skills 0`; desktop segmented control is 38px high total with 36px buttons; mobile keeps a 44px button target; search remains below; no `loaded` or `results` count copy; no horizontal overflow.

## UI Proof

- Local screenshots saved at `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-tight-toggle-mobile.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-tight-toggle-tablet.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-tight-toggle-desktop.png`, and `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-tight-toggle-screenshot-wide.png`.
target.author: jesse-merhi
